content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Learning Languages". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/277/problem/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers n and m. The next n lines contain a string and an integer. The next m lines contain a string.
content.outputFormat: For each of the m lines, output the maximum points that can be achieved.

hidden.label: max boundary
hidden.input:
5 5
English 10
Spanish 20
French 30
German 40
Italian 50
English
Spanish
French
German
Italian

hidden.label: uniform/edge cases
hidden.input:
3 3
English 10
English 10
English 10
English
English
English

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
general mixed case
hidden.input:
4 4
English 10
Spanish 20
French 30
German 40
English
Spanish
French
German

solution.approach: Create a dictionary to store the points for each language and then calculate the maximum points for each query.
